variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11910 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11910 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11910 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF1960 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11910
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF1960 axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
